arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Alaves
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Sunday’s away match against Alaves. REAL MADRID’S SQUAD LIST:

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-1 Brentford: Gunners toil to derby draw ahead of Real Madrid decider
arts.sum: Arsenal again dropped points in the Premier League title race as Brentford came from behind to earn a point.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-1 Brentford: Player Ratings as Gunners Prepare for Santiago Bernabeu Trip
arts.sum: Arsenal drew with Brentford ahead of their return leg with Real Madrid, their 12th draw in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Man United eye-up Ajax wonderkid dubbed 'the next Jude Bellingham' - as Red Devils get set to target young stars with high potential this summer
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester United are limited budget wise to what they can do at first team level this summer with a lot depending on who they can sell.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid youngster spotted in first-team training ahead of Alavés
arts.sum: An up-and-coming member of the academy ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid was afforded a call-up to senior training on Saturday. The player in question? Jesús Fortea. Real Madrid…

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid learn Copa del Rey final details
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two biggest clubs have on Saturday been made aware of the details of their upcoming showdown in the Copa del Rey final. The latest edition of El Clásico…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal injury blow ahead of crucial Real Madrid match
arts.sum: Arsenal have lost defender Ben White to an injury in training ahead of their Premier League game against Brentford and their all-important Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Real Madrid willing to play long game with Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly planning on making a move for Arsenal star William Saliba in either of the 2026 or 2027 summer transfer windows. Los Meringues are looking to bolster their defensive ranks after a series of injuries and lack of signings have depleted their depth in that part of the pitch. arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “We have to give a good performance and get back our good feelings”
arts.sum: “We have talked about giving a good performance tomorrow and trying to win. It’s clear that everyone is thinking about Wednesday's match, but that depends on tomorrow's performance.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta takes no chances with crucial Arsenal stars ahead of Real Madrid second leg
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has decided to rest a group of his key players for Arsenal's Premier League match against Brentford, with one eye on the huge Real Madrid match on Wednesday
